description: CompositionBlack running shorts made of Dri-Fit polyester with an in-built underwear, has yellow mesh panels on the sides, embroidered swoosh logo, and soft elastic waistband with a concealed drawstring for customised fitFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside-out in shadeCool iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanMake your training sessions all the more peaceful and comfortable in this pair of shorts from nike. The soft and wide waistband sits perfectly on your waist without irritating your skin, while the drawstring allows you to customise the fit. Engineered with Dri-fit technology, this shorts will keep you dry and fresh even after a gruelling session of jogging.
